module_description: Monitors web URL availability and expected HTTP response codes. Alerts when a URL is unreachable or returns an unexpected status code.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable monitoring for this URL.
hints.scheme: Protocol to use when the URL does not include a scheme (http:// or https://).
hints.threads: Number of URLs to check in parallel.
hints.url: Host or full URL to check. If empty, the item key is used.
hints.code: Expected HTTP response code. An alert is triggered when the actual code differs from this value.
hints.timeout: Request timeout in seconds. The check fails if the server does not respond within this time.
hints.verify_ssl: Verify the server's SSL certificate. Disable only for self-signed certificates.
